option_descs.Colorblind Mode: Distinguishes items whose only difference is color.
option_descs.Bonus Alignment: Due to how bonus rooms are handled across different resolutions, the background cannot be universally centered. Set this to your preferred resolution.
Desert Sky: Uses the Sky 1 gradient for Desert levels; The default for most themes.
Uses the Sunset 2 gradient for Desert levels.
Snow Sky: Uses the Sky 1 gradient for Snow levels; The default for most themes.
Uses the Snow 1 gradient for Snow levels.
Volcano Sky: Uses the Dark 1 gradient for Volcano levels.
Uses the Crimson 1 gradient for Volcano levels.
Airship Sky: Uses the Dark 1 gradient for Airship levels.
Uses the Storm 1 gradient for Airship levels.
